summary: Push Notifications Implementation Testing Complete. All backend API endpoints working correctly. Web Push and FCM subscription flows tested. Service worker exists and is accessible. PushNotificationSettings component exists but is NOT integrated into any page.

integration_issues.issue: PushNotificationSettings component exists at /app/frontend/src/components/PushNotificationSettings.js but is NOT imported or used in any page. Users cannot enable/disable push notifications from the UI.

action_items: IMPORTANT: PushNotificationSettings component needs to be integrated into a settings page or customer dashboard for users to enable push notifications
Consider adding a settings page route or adding the component to CustomerDashboard/AdminDashboard
critical_code_review_comments: PushNotificationSettings component is complete but NOT integrated - users cannot enable push notifications from UI
usePushNotifications hook correctly exports subscribe/unsubscribe functions
Service worker (sw.js) is properly configured and accessible at /sw.js
Firebase Cloud Messaging is MOCKED/STUBBED - requires FIREBASE_CREDENTIALS_PATH env var for production
VAPID keys are auto-generated for development - production should set VAPID_PRIVATE_KEY, VAPID_PUBLIC_KEY, VAPID_SUBJECT env vars
seed_data_creation: Created test push subscriptions during API testing (auto-cleaned)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Push notification backend APIs are fully functional. PushNotificationSettings component needs to be added to a page for users to enable notifications. The component has data-testid='push-notification-settings' and data-testid='push-toggle' for testing.

vapid_key_endpoint.details: Returns VAPID public key, no auth required

web_push_subscribe.details: Accepts Web Push subscription with endpoint and keys

test_push.details: Sends test notification to user's subscriptions

service_worker.details: sw.js exists at /app/frontend/public/sw.js and is accessible at /sw.js

push_notification_settings_component.details: Component exists with toggle switch but NOT integrated into any page

booking_push_integration.details: send_booking_status_push and send_admin_alert_push are called in smart booking, approve, and reject flows

mocked_apis.firebase_cloud_messaging: MOCKED - requires FIREBASE_CREDENTIALS_PATH env var to be configured
mocked_apis.web_push_actual_delivery: MOCKED in tests - actual delivery requires valid browser subscription
